rationale: Review 2 correctly approves on the reuse rubric — the main results are genuinely new and Mathlib API is reused well. Review 1's only findings (remove `sqrtTower_def` and `mem_sqrtTower_iff`) concern definitional wrapper lemmas proved by `rfl`/`Iff.rfl`, which are standard Mathlib convention; acting on them is a contested style call, not a clear improvement.
